case_title: DAWN PAULSEN VS. JENNIFER VAN HOFTEN et al

docket_entries.description: RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAULSEN, DAWN

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAULSEN, DAWN AS TO DEFENDANT VAN HOFTEN, JENNIFER HERTZ CORPORATION DOES 1-20 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-23-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-18-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-08-2003
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-07-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-07-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE MAY-23-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
